title: BEM-803 execute marker route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:30 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def files(g): return [str(p) for p in sorted(Path('.').glob(g)) if p.is_file()]
route=load('governance/state/bem802_route_after_processor_marker.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
queue=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json')
results=files('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/*.status.json')
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
if rs=='next_parse_dispatch_results':
    status='dispatch_results_to_parse'; next_action='parse status json and patch failure'
elif rs=='next_inspect_queue_shell_loop':
    status='queue_shell_loop_diagnosed'; next_action='if queue_count>0 and results=0, patch shell glob/commit path; if queue_count=0, create new queue item'
elif rs=='next_repair_runner_step_execution':
    status='runner_step_not_executing'; next_action='reposition queue step inside codex-runner job'
elif rs=='next_filter_response':
    status='filter_response_again'; next_action='filter real Claude response'
else:
    status='route_needs_diagnosis'; next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-803','status':status,'route_status':rs,'queue_count':len(queue),'queue_tail':queue[-10:],'result_count':len(results),'marker':marker,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem803_execute_marker_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem803_execute_marker_route.md').write_text('# BEM-803 | Execute Marker Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem803_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-803'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem803_execute_marker_route.json','governance/reports/bem803_execute_marker_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem803_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-802 marker route and recorded queue/result/marker facts')
"""
